name: wasmCloud OAM Application Manifest
description: Structure of a wasmCloud application manifest in Open Application Model (OAM) format consumed by wadm

fields.name: apiVersion
fields.description: OAM API version - must be core.oam.dev/v1beta1

fields.name: kind
fields.description: OAM resource kind - must be Application

fields.name: metadata
fields.description: Application metadata including name and annotations

fields.name: name
fields.description: Unique application name in the lattice

fields.name: annotations
fields.description: Key-value annotations for version and description

fields.name: components
fields.description: List of components, providers, and their traits

fields.name: name
fields.description: Unique component name within the application

fields.name: properties
fields.description: Component properties including OCI image reference

fields.name: traits
fields.description: List of traits such as spreadscaler and link definitions
